title: Hindon Prime — Urban Corridor
desc: A ring-fenced SPV land play on the Noida Expressway at Sector 144 (Hindon Belt). 20 Bigha (~20,000 Gaj) acquired at ₹16,000/Gaj against a ₹25,000/Gaj prevailing market value — a built-in ₹10 Cr value cushion. Capital funds leveling, boundary alignment and peripheral utilities, after which the parcel is offloaded as retail and institutional plots. Targets 18–24% annual investor returns; minimum ticket ₹5,00,000.

title: Shreeyantram — Himalayan Estate
desc: An asset-backed Himalayan land development in Ranikhet, Almora — 42 Nali (10,000 Sq. Yds.) for boutique luxury cottages, eco-wellness retreats and premium second homes with 180° snow-peak views. Acquired at ₹10,000/Sq. Yd. all-in against a ₹20,000/Sq. Yd. target retail price over a 4-year horizon. Choose 18% fixed annual yield (72% over 4 years) or 2× capital at maturity; minimum ticket ₹5,00,000.

title: Omkaram — Student Housing Complex
loc: Yamuna Expressway, Greater Noida (Near Galgotias University)
desc: A G+7 luxury student-housing complex on the Yamuna Expressway, minutes from Galgotias University and Greater Noida’s largest campus cluster. 150 studio suites / 300 premium beds on a 1,000 sq.m parcel, with capital split 50/50 between land acquisition and high-grade civil construction. A per-bed annual rental model targets a ~18.75% gross yield on capital, fully asset-backed by appreciating Yamuna Expressway land. Minimum ticket ₹5,00,000.

title: Namaskaram — Unisex Hostel
desc: A G+7 luxury unisex hostel in Dehradun — one of Uttarakhand’s largest student and education hubs. 150 studio suites / 300 premium beds on a 1,000 sq.m parcel, with capital split 50/50 between land acquisition and high-grade civil construction. A per-bed annual rental model targets a ~18.75% gross yield on capital, fully asset-backed by appreciating Dehradun land. Minimum ticket ₹5,00,000.

title: Swastikam Cottages — Hill Retreat
desc: A premium resort-and-residential cottage development in Bhauwala on the New Mussoorie Road, Dehradun — serene holiday homes set in the Mussoorie foothills. 100 luxury cottages across a 10,000 sq.yd estate (₹50 L per cottage; ₹50 Cr gross value), with strong short-term resort-rental potential and tourism-led capital appreciation. Investable in fractional tokens from ₹5,00,000.

title: Himalayan Hills — Cottages
desc: A premium hillside cottage resort set against the snow-clad Himalayan range — terraced double-storey cottages with panoramic mountain views, landscaped greens and a riverside clubhouse. A holiday-home and resort-rental play in one of the region’s most scenic belts. Investable in fractional tokens from ₹5,00,000. (Project figures pending the official report.)
